skills.name: Repo Artifact Inventory
skills.description: Inspect an unfamiliar repository and produce a deterministic inventory of classes, interfaces, services, controllers, models, repositories, jobs, consumers, configs, and utilities.

run_steps.title: Open in Cursor
run_steps.body: Type `/repo-analyser-repo-inventory` in chat, or read the agent spec manually.

run_steps.title: Read specs (in order)
run_steps.body: Agent spec → Skill spec → Eval blueprint → docs/HOW_TO_RUN.md

run_steps.title: Execute the task
run_steps.body: Follow phases in the agent spec. For repo tasks, set `repository_path`. For build tasks, produce code + tests + README with real command proofs.

run_steps.title: Write output JSON + report
run_steps.body: `python3 -m runtime.skill_finish write --run-id <run_id> --skill B1 --payload-file payload.json`

run_steps.title: Verify (optional)
run_steps.body: `make skill-done RUN_ID=<run_id> SKILL=B1` or open `generated_projects/<run_id>/B1/output.md`
